intentAndPurpose.intent: Circular single-text action button (max 2 characters). `attention` (high/medium/low) drives the full visual via surface-resolved bold/subtle/ghost variants. Supports `condensed` and `fullWidth` layout, `loading` (busy, non-disabled) and `disabled` states. Not a toggle — use IconButton/Chip for selection state.

props.name: children
props.description: Visible label — max 2 characters (e.g. "Ag", "En", "A", "12"). Longer text is truncated in dev with a warning.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size. S/M/L only — no XS.

props.name: attention
props.description: Figma attention alias. high→bold fill + on-bold text, medium→subtle fill + accent text, low→ghost (transparent) + accent text.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role. Widens the canonical 9-role set with 'tertiary'/'quaternary' for web parity. Explicit non-'auto' wins; otherwise inherits the nearest <Surface appearance>, falling back to 'primary'.

props.name: condensed
props.description: Reduces height/padding while keeping the same typography.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to fill container width — overrides the circular shape.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a circular spinner replacing the label and marks the control busy (aria-busy / accessibilityState.busy). Activation is suppressed while busy but the control is not visually disabled unless `disabled` is also set.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label override — children text is visible so this is optional.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. attention + appearance + the parent <Surface> drive bg / text — do not paint here. — [warn] SingleTextButton colour is surface-resolved from `attention` + `appearance`. Don't set backgroundColor; wrap in <Surface> and it adapts automatically.
